item.title: A Introduction [📌 PINNED]
item.description: Greetings! My name is Liam Inwards. I am 20 years old and live my life in the Netherlands, Over the past three years I have been embarking on a life changing journey of personal development and growth. During this journey I have been building the foundations of my spiritual beliefs that have just now recently led me to the christian faith. If I could show my former self where I would stand this current day I would have never thought it possible.
